# Plant Commerce

Plant comparison platform for permaculture crops. Search cultivars, compare nursery inventory, and browse species guidance.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://plantcommerce.app/
- Search: https://plantcommerce.app/search?q={query}
- Species: https://plantcommerce.app/plants/{species-slug}
- Cultivar: https://plantcommerce.app/plants/{species-slug}/{cultivar-slug}
- Pollination checker: https://plantcommerce.app/pollination?species={species-slug}
- Nurseries: https://plantcommerce.app/nurseries
- Feed: https://plantcommerce.app/feed.xml

## API

- Discovery: https://plantcommerce.app/api
- Search: `/api/search?q={query}&zone={1-13}&category={name}&inStock=true&limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Species: `/api/plants/{species-slug}?fields=canonical_name,cultivars.canonical_name&limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Cultivar: `/api/plants/{species-slug}/{cultivar-slug}?fields=canonical_name,offers.raw_price_text&limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Nurseries: `/api/nurseries?limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Nursery detail: `/api/nurseries/{nursery-slug}?limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Listings: `/api/listings?cultivarId={uuid}&limit={n}&offset={n}`
- Alerts create: `POST /api/alerts`
- Schema: `/api/schema`

## API Conventions

- Envelope: `{ ok, data, meta, links }`
- Pagination: `limit` + `offset`, with `meta.total` and `links.self/next/prev`
- Sparse fieldsets on plant endpoints via `fields` CSV

See `/llms-full.txt` for full endpoint and field details.
